view.title: Validate persona scenario #1

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the '5-session package purchase' scenario, but the evidence provided does not include specific outcomes or traces from this simulation. While prior steps indicate successful bookings and catalog visibility, they do not directly address the expected results of the persona scenario validation. Therefore, without concrete evidence of the scenario's execution and its outcomes, the validation remains inconclusive.
